headline: US Navy 🍆💥 STRIKES Iran Missile Boats 🚤💣
text: Uncle Sam 🇺🇸🦅 just YEETED 💥🚀 new strikes at southern Iran 🏜️⚔️, targeting Iranian missile launch pads 🔥🗼 and sneaky boats 🚤🧨 trying to plant sea-mines 💣🌊! Central Command says these hits were PURE SELF-DEFENSE 🛡️💪 to keep troops safe from Iranian flex 💪🇮🇷! Capt Tim Hawkins 🧢🗣️ drops: 'We keep it chill ❄️😌 but clap back when needed during this shaky ceasefire 🤝⏳!' Strikes rained near Bandar Abbas port city 🏙️🚢, home to Iran’s naval base right on the juicy Strait of Hormuz 🌊🍑! Iranian state TV 📺😱 reported 'BOOMS heard' while locals investigated 💥👀! Iran silent 🤫😶 on the latest clap-back, unclear if these strikes crash the peace talks ✌️🗣️! Secretary of State Marco Rubio 🇺🇸🗣️ told reporters in India 🇮🇳✈️ that a deal is STILL possible, just 'lots of back-and-forth language ping-pong 🏓🗯️!' He says Trump 🍊👑 wants a 'good deal or no deal' 🤑🚫, no rush 🐢⏳! Iranian spokesman Esmail Baqai 🧔📢 admits 'progress on big chunks' 🍰✅ but warns 'deal signing NOT imminent' ⛔🕰️! The 60-day ceasefire memo 📜🤝 would reopen Strait of Hormuz 🚢🌊 and kick nuclear talks 🧪⚛️! US intel 🕵️‍♂️ believes Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei 🧔‍♂️🏥 is hiding after Israeli strike wounds, slowing comms 📡😵! Enriched uranium stash 440kg 🧪⚖️ must be handed to US or blasted 'in place' 💥🏚️! Ceasefire since April 8 keeps Gulf tense 🌊😬, Iran choking shipping while US Navy blockades ports 🚫⚓! Feb 28 strikes by US & Israel sparked the whole Middle East BBQ 🔥🌍, Iran clapped back, closed Hormuz, oil prices went MOON 🌕💸! Rubio still optimistic 🤞😎, but Khamenei’s radio silence 📻❌ makes the final settlement look like a slow-burn rom-com 📽️💔!
